name: Rolling For Days
description: Gain free Shop rerolls.

name: Capital Gains I
description: Store gold equal to of the interest you earn. On -, gain all the stored gold. Gain gold now.

name: Champ Delivery
description: Gain -cost champions. After rounds, gain more.

name: Champ Delivery +
description: Gain -cost champions. After rounds, gain more.

name: Champ Delivery ++
description: Gain -cost champions. After rounds, gain more.

name: Flame On
description: The Inferno champion that dealt the most damage last combat is On Fire, gaining Attack Speed. Gain a Varus and an Akali.

name: Future Focused
description: Your Tactician loses Health, but after player combats, gain 4-cost champions and gold.

name: Loaded Dice
description: Your dice always roll 6 and your coins always flip heads. Roll a die and gain gold equal to the number rolled. Then flip a coin and gain gold if you flip heads.

name: Quick Streaks
description: You gain twice as much progress towards win and loss streaks. Gain gold.

name: Residual Magic
description: Your team gains Health. Each time you purchase a Wisp, increase this by.

name: Residual Magic +
description: Your team gains Health. Each time you purchase a Wisp, increase this by.

name: Residual Magic ++
description: Your team gains Health. Each time you purchase a Wisp, increase this by.

name: Verticality I
description: Champions gain Attack Damage, Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist for each ally that shares a trait with them.

name: Weight The Worth
description: Whenever you 3-star a champion, gain a copy of them each round for the rest of the game. Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator.

name: Wisp Rebate
description: Each time you purchase a Wisp, gain gold. Gain gold now.

name: Wisp Rebate +
description: Each time you purchase a Wisp, gain gold. Gain gold now.

name: Cybernetic Implants II
description: Your champions holding an item gain Health and Attack Damage.

name: Cybernetic Uplink II
description: Your champions holding an item gain Health and Mana Regen. Gain a Tear of the Goddess.

name: Beast Within
description: Primal grants an additional Blessing. Gain a Vi.

name: Blossom's Call
description: When you buy a Wisp, gain a random Blossom champion based on the Wisp's cost. Gain 3 Blossom champions.

name: Bonus Gift
description: Whenever you open a loot orb, you have a chance to gain a gray loot orb. Gain gray loot orbs.

name: Bonus Gift +
description: Whenever you open a loot orb, you have a chance to gain a gray loot orb. Gain gray loot orbs.

name: Capital Gains II
description: Store gold equal to of the interest you earn. On -, gain all the stored gold. Gain gold now.

name: Chosen of the Sun
description: Gain a Leona, a Kayle, and a Sejuani. Leona gains permanent max Health each round, increased by for each unique 3-star champion fielded.

name: Consuming Flora
description: Gain a Flora Fatalis emblem. The champion holding the emblem gains double benefits from the Flora Fatalis trait and gains Mana Regen.

name: Coven Acolyte
description: When you choose to continue gathering Coven essence, heal Tactician health. Gain a Camille, an Elise, and a Caitlyn.

name: Dark Ritual
description: Converting Coven Essence to rewards grants Coven champions Ability Power instead of loot. Gain a Camille, an Elise, and a Caitlyn.

name: Embiggen
description: Your Fae pixies are larger and grant more Attack Damage and Ability Power. Gain a Xayah and a Rakan.

name: FOURcing
description: Gain a random 4-cost champion. For each item equipped to that champion, your team gains health.

name: Item Extraction
description: The first times you sacrifice a champion in the Eldritch hex, gain a copy of a random component they're holding. Gain a Veigar, a Rek'Sai, and item removers.

name: Jungle Pathing
description: Gain a Pebbles, a Cinderling, a Scuttle Crab, and a Murkwolf. Each time you level up, gain a new Riftbeast and gold.

name: Money Hungry+
description: Gain gold now, then gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.

name: Nature's Shelter
description: Champions that start combat adjacent to an Elderwood plant gain Attack Speed and heal of their maximum Health every seconds. Gain 3 Elderwood champions.

name: Omega Riftbeast
description: You can now choose a second Alpha Riftbeast. Gain 3 Riftbeasts.

name: Razor's Edge
description: Gain a 2-star 2-cost champion and Item Removers. After winning a player combat, gain gold per item component on your item bench.

name: Small Furry Friend
description: While Sprykin is active, gain a second BFF summon that is as powerful. Gain 3 Sprykin champions.

name: Sun and Moon
description: Your Lunar champions gain Health and Damage Amp for each unique Solar champion fielded. Gain a 2-star Leona, a Kayle, and an Aphelios.

name: Verticality II
description: Champions gain Attack Damage, Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist for each ally that shares a trait with them.

name: Buried Treasures III
description: Gain a random item component now and at the start of the next rounds.

name: Component Quest
description: Gain a random component and gold. The next 7 times you win a player combat, gain a different random component. Afterwards, gain a Spatula.

name: Nesting Anvils
description: Gain an Artifact Anvil. After you open it, gain a Completed Item Anvil. After you open that, gain a Component Anvil. After you open that, gain gold.

name: Nesting Anvils +
description: Gain an Artifact Anvil. After you open it, gain a Completed Item Anvil. After you open that, gain a Component Anvil. After you open that, gain gold.

name: Nesting Dolls
description: After a champion dies in combat, spawn a copy of them one star level lower with health. Gain free rerolls

name: Starring Up
description: After 3-starring champions, set your level to. Gain rerolls now and at the start of every round.

name: Trait Ladder
description: Gain a random emblem. After fielding non-unique traits in a player combat, gain a reward. Then increase the number of traits needed and the size of the reward.

name: Verticality III
description: Champions gain Attack Damage, Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist for each ally that shares a trait with them.
